item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Paladin's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned paladin─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level paladin to 70 and complete all job quests up through “Raising the Sword.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
